2.q: LpPLDδ3 was repressed by LpABF2 and LpABF4 and positively involved in perennial ryegrass osmotic and heat stress responses.

3.q: LpPLDδ3 was repressed by LpABF2 and LpABF4 and positively involved in perennial ryegrass osmotic and heat stress responses.

4.q: LpABF2 and LpABF4 depressed the LpPLDδ3 expression by directly binding to its ABRE core‐binding motif of promoter region.

5.q: LpABF2 and LpABF4 depressed the LpPLDδ3 expression by directly binding to its ABRE core‐binding motif of promoter region.

6.q: In plants, Δ1-pyrroline-5-carboxylate synthase (P5CS) is the rate-limiting enzyme in proline biosynthesis.
